title: Count Subarrays With Fixed Bounds
titleCn: 统计定界子数组的数目

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,5,2,7,5], minK = 1, maxK = 5 Output: 2 Explanation: The fixed-bound subarrays are [1,3,5] and [1,3,5,2].
nums = [1,1,1,1], minK = 1, maxK = 1 Output: 10 Explanation: Every subarray of nums is a fixed-bound subarray. There are 10 possible subarrays.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: Every subarray of nums is a fixed-bound subarray. There are 10 possible subarrays.
